title: Chewy Malaysian Herba Noodles
description: A quick-fix herbal Malaysian dish featuring chewy noodles made with a paleo-friendly base.
instructions: In a wok or large frying pan, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat.
Add ginger and garlic pastes to the pan and stir until fragrant.
Pour in tamarind concentrate and sugar. Simmer for about 2-3 minutes until thickened slightly.
Stir in cumin powder and cook for another minute.
Gradually add chickpea pasta, salt, and enough water to cover the pasta. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, partially cover the pan, and let it simmer for about 10 minutes until the sauce coats the noodles well.
Once done, remove from heat and mix in fresh coriander leaves (optional). Sprinkle sesame seeds on top before serving.
Serve hot as a snack or light meal.
